name: Raspberry-Marzipan Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package (3-1/2 ounces) Almond paste, finely chopped
1 cup Fresh or unsweetened frozen (thawed) raspberries
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------STREUSEL----------------------------------
1/4 cup Firm margarine or butter
1/3 cup All-purpose flour
1/4 cup Sugar
1/3 cup Slivered almonds
Beat all ingredients except almond paste, raspberries, and Streusel in a medium bowl on low speed for 30 seconds. Beat on medium speed for 2 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally.
Spread half of the batter in the prepared pan. Sprinkle with half each of the almond paste, raspberries, and Streusel. Repeat layers.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 50 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Yield: 12 pieces; Calories per piece: 290.
If using self-rising flour, omit baking powder and salt.
STREUSEL: Cut margarine into flour and sugar until crumbly. Stir in nuts.
